title: Proofpoint TAP Threat Status False-Positive Review Queue
app: Proofpoint TAP Modular Input for Splunk (Splunkbase 3681)
spl:
index=email sourcetype="proofpoint_tap_siem" earliest=-30d
| eval ts=coalesce(threatStatus, ThreatStatus, "")
| where ts="falsePositive"
| stats count by classification, threatId
| sort -count
description: Threats marked `falsePositive` in TAP SIEM exports show analyst or engine corrections—tracking them in Splunk supports tuning, quality review, and audit evidence for email security operations.
value: Quantifies how often classifications are overturned, helping managers justify rule changes and training while documenting review cadence.
implementation: `threatStatus` may appear under `threatsInfoMap` arrays; expand multivalue fields if needed. Exclude cleared test campaigns via sender allow list. Export monthly summaries to GRC when required. Coordinate field names with Proofpoint support if using custom parsers.
visualization: Table (classification × threatId), timechart of false-positive volume, pie by threat family.

references.title: Proofpoint TAP Modular Input for Splunk
